intro: Agropyron grandiglume, also known as big spike grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help alleviate conditions like arthritis and respiratory infections.
